title: Chain 1/14: Wake Up
scene: 周末早上八点，室友来叫你起床。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.cn: 张伟，八点了，起来吃早饭吗？
turns.en: Zhang Wei, it's eight. Want to get up for breakfast?
Five more minutes… It's the weekend.

turns.cn: 你不是要遛狗吗？九点前凉快。
turns.en: Aren't you walking the dog? Cooler before nine.

turns.cn: 对对对，我起来了，谢谢叫我。
turns.en: Oh right. I'm up. Thanks for waking me.
I started the coffee maker.
Awesome. I'll brush up first.

title: Chain 2/14: Breakfast
scene: 你在厨房做早餐，和家人聊今天安排。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Eggs or oatmeal?

turns.cn: 煎蛋吧，等下遛狗回来再订菜。
turns.en: Eggs, please. I'll order groceries after the walk.
Can you grab a carton of milk?
Sure. I'll add it to my phone notes.

turns.cn: 下午大扫除，你负责卫生间？
turns.en: Deep clean this afternoon. You take the bathroom?
Okay. I'll make dinner tonight.

title: Chain 3/14: Package at Door
scene: 门铃响了，快递员送货。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Delivery! Anyone home?

turns.cn: 在的，请放门口就行，谢谢。
turns.en: Yes. Just leave it by the door, thanks.

turns.cn: 这个要签字，您方便开门吗？
turns.en: This one needs a signature. Can you open the door?
Okay. One sec, opening now.
Sign here. Have a good weekend.
You too. Bye.

title: Chain 4/14: Walking the Dog
scene: 你带狗下楼散步，在小区遇见邻居。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Good morning! Your dog's full of energy.

turns.cn: 早上好，周末它特别兴奋。
turns.en: Morning. It gets extra excited on weekends.

turns.cn: 那边草坪刚喷了药，别让它进去。
turns.en: They just sprayed the lawn over there. Keep it off.
Thanks for the heads-up. We'll stay on the sidewalk.
Bye!
Bye. Have a nice weekend!

title: Chain 5/14: Order Groceries
scene: 遛完狗，你打电话订超市配送。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Grocery delivery. Account number, please?

turns.cn: 五五五一二三四，要牛奶和鸡蛋。
turns.en: Five five five one two three four. Milk and eggs, please.

turns.cn: 今天下午两点到四点可以吗？
turns.en: Today between two and four PM okay?
Yes. Leave at the door.
Tip through the app?
Yes. I'll pay online. Thank you.

title: Chain 6/14: Work from Home Call
scene: 上午十点，你在家接同事电话。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Good time to talk?
Sure. Go ahead.

turns.cn: 文档第三部分，截止下周五对吗？
turns.en: Part three of the doc — due next Friday, right?
Yes. Next Friday by five PM.
Okay. Draft Monday.
Sounds good. I'll look over the weekend.

title: Chain 7/14: Lunch Delivery
scene: 中午外卖送到门口。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Your delivery.
Thanks. Is this from the Thai place?
Yes. Enjoy your meal!
Wait, no chopsticks?
Check the small pocket in the bag.
Oh, got them. Thanks!

title: Chain 8/14: Neighbor Borrows Tool
scene: 下午邻居敲门借工具。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.cn: 能借一下螺丝刀吗？我挂画。
turns.en: Can I borrow a screwdriver? I'm hanging a picture.
Sure. I'll grab it.
Thanks. Back in half an hour.
No rush. Leave it by my door.

turns.cn: 物业说明天停水两小时。
turns.en: Management says water's off two hours tomorrow.
Good to know. I'll store water tonight.

title: Chain 9/14: Property Repair Call
scene: 厨房水槽漏水，你打电话给物业报修。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.cn: 物业前台，请问什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Property management. How can I help?

turns.cn: 三零二厨房水槽下面漏水。
turns.en: Unit three oh two. Leak under the kitchen sink.
How bad? Do you need to shut the main valve?

turns.cn: 不严重，一滴一滴，今天能派人吗？
turns.en: Not bad. Dripping. Can someone come today?

turns.cn: 维修下午两点到四点之间。
turns.en: Maintenance between two and four PM.
Okay. I'll be home. Thank you.

title: Chain 10/14: Weekend Deep Clean
scene: 下午你和室友分工做大扫除。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.cn: 大扫除开始，你卫生间我客厅？
turns.en: Deep clean time. You bathroom, me living room?

turns.cn: 可以，吸尘器在我房间，随便用。
turns.en: Sure. Vacuum's in my room. Help yourself.

turns.cn: 清洁剂在厨房柜子下面。
turns.en: Cleaner is under the kitchen cabinet.
Got it. About an hour for me.
Pizza when we're done?
Deal. My treat.

title: Chain 11/14: Laundry and Trash
scene: 大扫除后洗衣服、倒垃圾。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Is the washer free?

turns.cn: 空了，你用吧，我去倒垃圾。
turns.en: All yours. I'm taking out the trash.
Separate recycling?
Yes. Flatten boxes for the blue bin.
Thanks. Pizza when you're back.
Be right back.

title: Chain 12/14: Cooking Dinner
scene: 傍晚做晚饭，家人来帮忙。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Smells great. Need help?
Set the table. Dinner at six thirty.
Did the milk delivery arrive?
Yes. It's in the fridge.
Deep clean was tiring, huh?

turns.cn: 还行，吃完我们看剧放松。
turns.en: Not too bad. Let's watch a show after dinner.

title: Chain 13/14: Watch TV Together
scene: 晚饭后你和室友在客厅看剧闲聊。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: What should we watch? I found a new series.
Something light. I don't want to think today.
Sure. I'll cast it. Want popcorn?
Yes. I'll microwave some.
This episode's pretty funny.
Yeah. We can continue tomorrow.

title: Chain 14/14: Good Night
scene: 晚上十点，准备睡觉。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: What time's your alarm tomorrow?
Seven. Back to the workweek.
I'll turn off the lights.
Thanks. Today was full but good.
Good night.
Good night. See you tomorrow.
